SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-23-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF DANIEL YANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SILVERIO GARCIA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
